mapper.select: SELECT mth.matching_number AS "matching_number", mtr.member_name AS "mentor_name", mte.member_name AS "mentee_name", mth.matching_start AS "matching_start", ulr.report_number AS "lr_report_number", ulr.report_week AS "lr_report_week", ulr.report_session AS "lr_report_session", ulr.report_date AS "lr_report_date", ulr.subject_number AS "lr_subject_number", usj.subject_name AS "lr_subject_name", ulr.subject_title AS "lr_subject_title", ulr.subject_summary AS "lr_subject_summary", ulr.subject_content AS "lr_subject_content" FROM UB_MATCHING mth INNER JOIN UB_LEARNING_REPORT ulr ON mth.matching_number = ulr.matching_number INNER JOIN UB_MEMBER mtr ON mth.mentor_number = mtr.member_number INNER JOIN UB_MEMBER mte ON mth.mentee_number = mte.member_number LEFT OUTER JOIN UB_SUBJECT usj ON mth.subject_number = usj.subject_number WHERE mth.matching_number = #{matchingNumber} ORDER BY mth.matching_number

SELECT mth.matching_number AS "matching_number", mth.matching_start AS "matching_start", mth.matching_cancel AS "matching_end", mth.matching_state AS "matching_state", usj.subject_name AS "subject_name" FROM UB_MATCHING mth LEFT OUTER JOIN UB_SUBJECT usj ON mth.subject_number = usj.subject_number WHERE mth.mentor_number = #{mentorNumber}
SELECT suj.subject_number AS "subject_number", suj.subject_name AS "subject_name" FROM UB_SUBJECT suj
